title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 491.675 - Citation of sections 491.675 to 491.705
text:
491.675.  Citation of sections 491.675 to 491.705. — The provisions of sections 491.675 to 491.705 shall be known and may be cited as the "Child Victim Witness Protection Law".
(L. 1985 H.B. 366, et al. § 7, A.L. 1987 H.B. 598)
